title: thymus chamaedrys var. pulegioides
intro: Thymus chamaedrys var. pulegioides, also known as wild thyme, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which make it effective against various types of infections. The health benefits of Thymus chamaedrys var. pulegioides include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Wild thyme can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or oil, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and tinctures, to treat a range of health conditions.
